mdRecord.dcterms:title: William M. Meredith to Gertrude G. Biddle, April 2, 1864
mdRecord.dcterms:description: William M. Meredith to Gertrude G. Biddle from Harrisburg, Pennsylvania, discussing her receipt of a letter from James C. Biddle, Willie, and a visitor's astonishment with Harrisburg.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Civil War
United States--History--Civil War, 1861-2114
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
mdRecord.dcterms:creator: Meredith, William M.
